common.copyFailed: Could not copy. Check your browser permissions.

errors.2008: Too many requests. Try again later.
errors.4010: You are not signed in or your session has expired
errors.4011: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
errors.4037: The private image token is invalid or has expired
errors.4042: The private image token has been revoked
errors.1004: The verification service is temporarily unavailable
errors.1003: Image processing failed. Large 4K+ images may require more imgproxy memory.

layout.deletionTitle: Your account is scheduled for deletion
layout.deletionMessage: Your account will be permanently deleted in {{hours}} hours and {{minutes}} minutes. Download any data you need before then.

upload.title: Upload images
upload.dropzone: Click or drag images here to upload
upload.dropzoneHint: JPG, PNG, BMP, WebP, and AVIF; up to 15 MB each.

persistence.volatileWarning: {{count}} image(s) could not be saved for recovery. Keep this tab open until upload finishes.
persistence.storageUnavailable: Browser storage could not preserve this upload for recovery. Free browser storage and retry.
persistence.v1OutcomeUnknown: A legacy upload was interrupted with an unknown result. Check My Images before removing it or uploading the source again.

errors.IMAGE_FILE_INVALID: The selected file is not a valid image.
errors.IMAGE_FILE_SIZE_EXCEEDED: The image exceeds the {{maxMB}} MB limit.
errors.IMAGE_FORMAT_UNSUPPORTED: This image format is not supported.
errors.IMAGE_CONTENT_MISMATCH: The image content does not match its file type.
errors.IMAGE_ANIMATION_UNSUPPORTED: Animated images are not supported in this version.
errors.IMAGE_DIMENSION_EXCEEDED: The image exceeds the allowed {{maxMP}} MP limit.
errors.IMAGE_RECIPE_UNSUPPORTED: This client does not support the server image recipe.
errors.IMAGE_PROCESSOR_UNAVAILABLE: This browser cannot safely process this image. Use another compatible device or reduce it below {{maxMP}} MP.
errors.IMAGE_DECODE_FAILED: This browser could not decode the image.
errors.IMAGE_WEBP_ENCODE_UNAVAILABLE: This browser cannot encode WebP images.
errors.IMAGE_PROCESSING_TIMEOUT: Local image processing timed out. Try again.

auth.bannedMessage: Your account has been suspended by an administrator. Contact the administrator if you think this is a mistake.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created. You can now sign in.

validation.passwordMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.usernameMin3: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameMax50: Username must be no more than 50 characters
validation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters

list.empty: You have not uploaded any images yet
list.confirmBatchDeleteDesc: Delete the selected {{count}} images? This action cannot be undone.

toast.deleteAllFailed: Delete failed. Related access tokens may need to be removed first.

detail.privateHint: Available only through a tokenized link
detail.processingHint: Convert format, dimensions, and quality with imgproxy.
detail.tokenHelp: Private images require a link containing an access token.
detail.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The image will be permanently deleted.

toast.setToPrivate: Image is now private. Its public link is no longer available.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and security settings

settings.title: Preferences
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language used by the interface

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.tooLarge: The image must be no larger than 5 MB
avatar.updateFailed: Could not update avatar. Try again.

account.title: Account information
account.description: View your account and storage usage
account.loadFailed: Could not load your account information. Try again later.

password.title: Change password
password.description: You will be signed out after changing your password. Sign in again with the new password.
password.newMinLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters
password.changeFailed: Could not change your password. Try again later.

users.title: Users
users.unbanDesc: The user will be able to sign in and use the service again.
users.banDesc: The user will no longer be able to sign in. Existing images will not be affected.
users.quotaUpdateFailed: Could not update the quota. Try again.
users.deleteDesc: This immediately locks the account and permanently deletes all of its data after 24 hours.
users.deleteAllowDownload: Allows up to 10 archive downloads of original images
users.deleteAfter24h: Permanently deletes the account after 24 hours
users.deleteCancellable: Can be cancelled during the 24-hour waiting period
users.deletionInitFailed: Could not schedule account deletion. Try again.
users.undoDeletionFailed: Could not cancel deletion. Try again.

images.title: Images
images.deleteDesc: The image and its related data will be permanently deleted.
images.deleteFailed: Could not delete the image. Try again.

configs.title: System settings
configs.subtitle: Configure verification, private image tokens, and watermarks
configs.siteLanguageDesc: Set the default interface language for every visitor
configs.captchaDesc: Configure the CAPTCHA provider used during registration and sign-in
configs.scriptHintGeetest: The page must load the GeeTest v4 SDK
configs.siteKeyPlaceholder: Public key used by the browser
configs.secretPlaceholder: Secret key used by the server
configs.tokenTtlDesc: Set the default lifetime of tokens used to access private images
configs.watermarkDesc: When enabled, a watermark is added to images processed by imgproxy
configs.opacityHint: 0.3–0.7 is recommended. Higher values are more opaque.
configs.r2Desc: Store new uploads only in R2 and deliver them through a CDN without using local disk space.
configs.publicUrlHint: A custom domain connected to the R2 bucket in the Cloudflare dashboard
configs.r2MigrateHint: Enabling R2 affects only new uploads. Existing images keep their current storage target until the standalone migration tool is available.
configs.saveFailed: Could not save settings. Try again.

hero.subtitle: Fast and reliable image hosting with global CDN delivery and stable direct links.

fastTransfer.title: Fast delivery
fastTransfer.desc: Global CDN acceleration provides responsive uploads and downloads.

permanentLink.title: Stable direct links
permanentLink.desc: HTTPS image links that can be embedded in any website.

secure.title: Private by design
secure.desc: Protect private images with expiring access tokens.

analytics.title: Usage insights
analytics.desc: Track view counts for every image.

management.title: Simple management
management.desc: Organize images and switch between public and private access at any time.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-platform
crossPlatform.desc: Use the web interface, API, and desktop clients across your devices.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: An overview of your images and storage

empty.title: You have not uploaded any images yet
empty.desc: Upload your first image to get started
